videos.headline: Clemson's 4th-down stop seals 2OT win vs. Wake Forest
videos.description: Clemson holds off Wake Forest with a 4th-down stop in the second overtime to win 51-45 vs. Wake Forest.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Clemson's 4th-down stop seals 2OT win vs. Wake Forest) 2022/09/24 ESHEET

videos.headline: Uiagalelei shows pocket poise with 12-yard TD
videos.description: DJ Uiagalelei does a great job in the pocket as he finds Jake Briningstool for the 12-yard touchdown, giving Clemson a 7-0 lead.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Uiagalelei shows pocket poise with 12-yard TD) 2022/09/24 ESHEET

videos.headline: Uiagalelei finds Spector for 41-yard TD
videos.description: DJ Uiagalelei connects with Brannon Spector for a 41-yard touchdown as Clemson pads its lead to 14-0.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Uiagalelei finds Spector for 41-yard TD) 2022/09/24 ESHEET

videos.headline: Jahmal Banks goes up for the Demon Deacons' touchdown
videos.description: Sam Hartman steps up and finds Jahmal Banks for the Wake Forest touchdown as they cut it to 14-7.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Jahmal Banks goes up for the Demon Deacons' touchdown) 2022/09/24 ESHEET

videos.headline: Jahmal Banks comes up with two big catches on Wake Forest TD drive
videos.description: Jahmal Banks comes up with two big snags including a touchdown catch as Wake Forest cuts it to 17-14.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Jahmal Banks comes up with two big catches on Wake Forest TD drive) 2022/09/24 ESHEET

videos.headline: Donavon Greene hauls in 28-yard TD for Wake Forest
videos.description: Donavon Greene hauls in the 28-yard score as Wake Forest takes a 21-20 lead vs. Clemson.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Donavon Greene hauls in 28-yard TD for Wake Forest) 2022/09/24 ESHEET

videos.headline: Hartman finds Whiteheart to pad Demon Deacons' lead
videos.description: Sam Hartman finds Blake Whiteheart on the 19-yard score as Wake Forest pads its lead to 28-20 vs. Clemson.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Hartman finds Whiteheart to pad Demon Deacons' lead) 2022/09/24 ESHEET

videos.headline: Clemson ties it up after Uiagalelei's TD pass, 2-point conversion
videos.description: DJ Uiagalelei finds Davis Allen for the touchdown and then converts the 2-point conversion while balancing on one leg as Clemson ties it at 28 a piece.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Clemson ties it up after Uiagalelei's TD pass, 2-point conversion) 2022/09/24 ESHEET

videos.headline: Greene's toe-tap TD puts Wake Forest ahead
videos.description: Donavon Greene's gets the toe-tap touchdown as Wake Forest goes ahead 35-28 vs. Clemson.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Greene's toe-tap TD puts Wake Forest ahead) 2022/09/24 ESHEET

videos.headline: Shipley bulldozes his way into the end zone for Clemson TD
videos.description: Will Shipley bulldozes his way and reaches for the Clemson touchdown as they tie it 35-35.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Shipley bulldozes his way into the end zone for Clemson TD) 2022/09/24 ESHEET

videos.headline: Hartman sets single-game Wake Forest record with TD pass in overtime
videos.description: Sam Hartman finds A.T. Perry for his sixth touchdown pass and sets the Wake Forest single game school record to give Wake Forest a 45-38 lead.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Hartman sets single-game Wake Forest record with TD pass in overtime) 2022/09/24 ESHEET

videos.headline: Davis Allen's touchdown puts Clemson ahead in the 2nd OT
videos.description: Davis Allen makes a nice grab for the score as Clemson goes ahead 51-45 in the second overtime vs. Wake Forest.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Davis Allen's touchdown puts Clemson ahead in the 2nd OT) 2022/09/24 ESHEET

videos.headline: DJ Uiagalelei throws 21-yard touchdown pass to Beaux Collins
videos.description: DJ Uiagalelei throws 21-yard touchdown pass to Beaux Collins

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (DJ Uiagalelei throws 21-yard touchdown pass to Beaux Collins) 2022/09/24 ESHEET
